subject: peristent error
body:
I am getting a persistent error: 

Unhandled exception. System.NotImplementedException: The method or 
operation is not implemented.
   at MCore.MCore.WorkerDied(Object sender, EventArgs e) in 
/home/runner/micromamba/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1750964440471/work/MCore/MCore.cs:line 
599
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.ReportDeath() in 
/home/runner/micromamba/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1750964440471/work/WarpLib/WorkerWrapper.cs:line 
264
   at Warp.WorkerWrapper.<StartHeartbeat>b__14_0() in 
/home/runner/micromamba/envs/package-build/conda-bld/warp_1750964440471/work/WarpLib/WorkerWrapper.cs:line 
190
/tmp/slurmd/job32468010/slurm_script: line 26: 2220026 Aborted             
    (core dumped) MCore --population m/Cores.population --refine_imagewarp 
1x1 --refine_particles

Am I running out of memory? 
I have ~4000 subtomos (two species), refinement is at ~10A, particle size 
is 250A for one and 330A for the other species. Data are binned to 3.02 
A/pix. I am using one GPU on a  node, and no --perdevice_refine switch (in 
attempt to conserve memory). 

It even fails on  
MCore --population m/Cores.population --refine_imagewarp 1x1 
--refine_particles
